findings.title: spec schema 数断言与产物矛盾：写 121，实为 321
findings.evidence: | **OpenAPI Spec** | OpenAPI 3.1.0 | `https://aisa.one/openapi.yaml` | Machine-readable specification covering 111+ API paths and 121 schemas |

findings.title: spec category 数断言与产物矛盾：写 10，实为 14
findings.evidence: The consolidated OpenAPI spec at `/openapi.yaml` covers all 111+ AIsa API paths organized into 10 categories. It is the authoritative machine-readable contract for constructing API requests.
findings.reproduce: python3 -c "import yaml;d=yaml.safe_load(open('openapi.yaml'));t=set();[t.add(x) for p in d['paths'].values() for m,o in p.items() if m in ('get','post','put','patch','delete') and isinstance(o,dict) for x in o.get('tags',[])];print(len(t))"

findings.title: API 分类表不完整：列出 10 类，spec 实有 14 个承载操作的分类，遗漏 4 个
findings.evidence: Agent Email(46 ops); Reddit(5 ops); SEO & Search Data(445 ops); Sales Intelligence(54 ops)
findings.reproduce: python3 -c "import yaml;d=yaml.safe_load(open('openapi.yaml'));t=set();[t.add(x) for p in d['paths'].values() for m,o in p.items() if m in ('get','post','put','patch','delete') and isinstance(o,dict) for x in o.get('tags',[])];print(len(t))"

findings.title: 中文覆盖率 1.5%（11/743）
findings.reproduce:
find . -name '*.mdx' | grep -iE 'zh|chinese|/cn' | wc -l  # 分子
find . -name '*.mdx' | wc -l  # 分母

findings.title: spec path/endpoint 数严重低估：写 111+，实为 645
findings.evidence: | **OpenAPI Spec** | OpenAPI 3.1.0 | `https://aisa.one/openapi.yaml` | Machine-readable specification covering 111+ API paths and 121 schemas |
